findings.title: Deliverability gate cannot pass while source-backed implementable backlog remains open
findings.resolution: Created queued slices S007 and S008 instead of claiming final deliverability.

summary: Build/type-check prerequisites and focused API/CLI runtime/permission gates passed.
S006 cannot be the final release gate because S003 classified multi-instance coordination and production remote-orphan governance as implementable later candidates, not external blockers.
The next Orchestrator action is to complete S007 and S008, then rerun the final deliverability gate.
review_gate: Final release-readiness review with findings first and explicit residual risk list.
